design_philosophy: Kiosk Terminal Optimization: Prioritize the '2-Second Rule'. Minimalist interface, massive touch targets, ultra-high contrast, and clear hierarchy. Eliminate split-screen website patterns in favor of a centered, focused self-checkout aesthetic using an orange primary palette.

anti_patterns: Avoid small text below 16px for interactive elements

layout_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing: Large touch targets for kiosk environment.
layout_spacing.container: max-w-4xl mx-auto h-screen flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-8
layout_spacing.touch_targets: Minimum height 80px for primary buttons, 64px for secondary.

buttons.primary: Massive full-width or large grid blocks. bg-[#FF5C00] text-white hover:bg-[#E05200] rounded-xl shadow-lg transition-transform active:scale-95 h-24 text-2xl flex items-center justify-center gap-4
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#0A0A0A] border-2 border-[#E5E7EB] hover:border-[#FF5C00] hover:bg-orange-50 rounded-xl transition-all h-20 text-xl flex items-center justify-center gap-4

numpad_modal.description: Popup form for PIN entry. Must not replace view. Use Shadcn Dialog.
numpad_modal.key: h-20 w-full text-3xl font-bold bg-[#F4F5F7] rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center active:bg-[#FF5C00] active:text-white transition-colors cursor-pointer
numpad_modal.display: text-center text-4xl tracking-[0.5em] font-bold py-8 border-b-2 border-border mb-6 min-h-[100px]

cards.style: bg-white rounded-3xl shadow-[0_20px_50px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)] border border-white/20 p-10 md:p-16 w-full max-w-2xl

inputs.style: h-16 text-xl px-6 rounded-xl border-2 border-border focus:border-[#FF5C00] focus:ring-4 focus:ring-[#FF5C00]/20 bg-[#F9FAFB]

motion_interactions.buttons: Immediate response, slight scale down on active (tap). No slow fades.
motion_interactions.modal: Slide up or scale up entrance animation using Framer Motion or Shadcn defaults.

icons.notes: Use bold, easily recognizable icons for PIN, Face ID, and Key (Password).

page_structure.header: Subtle top bar with logo and live clock/date to enforce the kiosk terminal feel.

elements: Grid of massive buttons for login options

page_structure.actions_layout: Grid of 1 column or 2 columns based on screen size. Primary action (PIN) gets full width, others share space.
removed_features: Schermtoetsenbord (touchscreen) button must be completely absent.

kiosk_background.description: Optional: very subtle abstract light orange/grey gradient background to overlay with #F4F5F7 (opacity 0.1) if pure CSS feels too plain.

brand_logo.description: Use purely text-based 'Vastgoed' or a simple SVG icon if no logo is provided.

instructions_to_main_agent: Delete any split-screen layout code. Use a single-page full-screen centered flex layout.
Create a massive central card (max-w-2xl) with rounded-3xl and soft shadow.
Add a top-right or top-center live clock to make it feel like a true KIOSK.
Implement 'Inloggen met PIN code' as a Dialog (modal) containing a custom CSS grid Numpad. Do not route to a new page.
Make the PIN numpad keys very large (h-20 or more) with large numbers.
Provide standard email/password login either as an expandable accordion inside the main card or a secondary view, but keep PIN as the prominent quick-action.
Add Face ID as a secondary button with an icon.
Ensure the primary color #FF5C00 is used for the most important CTAs and focus rings.
All buttons must have 'active:scale-95' or similar touch-feedback.
Add data-testid to all buttons and inputs.
